---
id: categorize-classification-image-classification-name-dataset-categorize-post

description: "Categorizes a specific classification image for a given classification model and category."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Categorize a classification image"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/classification/{name}/dataset/categorize"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Categorizes a specific classification image for a given classification model and category.
    The image must exist in the specified category. Returns a success message or an error if the name or category is invalid.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"name","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"Name"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"Body"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
